action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline eval improved to rmse_z500=1043.3, rmse_t850=5.24 with hidden=128 U-Net, but training plateaus within 3 epochs and validation is noisy, suggesting under-capacity and possible persistence bias. Analysis: Model is tiny (~18M params) relative to 1B budget and 31GB VRAM. Weather forecasting benefits strongly from residual prediction (predict delta from persistence) and data augmentation (longitude rotation). Decision: Scale model to hidden=256 (~70-80M params), add residual connection (target = last_frame + delta), add random longitude roll augmentation, increase dropout to 0.1, train up to 60 epochs with patience=12. This should lower RMSE significantly while fitting in time budget.
